sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Enefit Green Signs Loan Agreement Amendment with Swedbank
feed.summary: Enefit Green has signed an amendment to its loan agreement with Swedbank, originally taken out on 28 December 2022 for 50 million euros.
